properties.name: Mo Mowlam Play Park
properties.description: Located within the Stormont Estate, this is one of the best inclusive play parks in NI. Features a massive range of equipment for all abilities in a beautiful, safe setting.

properties.name: Seapark Bay Beach
properties.description: A family-favorite coastal spot in Holywood. Features a sandy beach, a large green space for picnics, and a fantastic modern playground.

properties.name: Wallace Park
properties.description: The 'green lung' of Lisburn. Offers beautiful landscaped walks, a large children's play area, duck pond, and plenty of space for family sports.

properties.name: Hillsborough Forest Park
properties.description: Features a stunning lake walk and a brand-new, world-class woodland play area. Keep an eye out for the local swans and enjoy the lakeside sculpture trail.

properties.name: Montalto Estate Play Park
properties.description: A high-end natural play experience. Includes a treehouse, climbing frames, and forest trails designed to encourage imaginative outdoor play.

properties.name: WWT Castle Espie
properties.description: A brilliant wetland wildlife centre on Strangford Lough. Kids can feed the geese, explore the 'Secret Swamp' walk, and enjoy the indoor soft play.
